case_title: GIMME SHOES INC. VS BARONE, MAURIZIO

docket_entries.description: AUTHORIZATION FROM LEIGH STACKPOLE FILED AUTHORI- ZING MICHAEL WILSON TO RETRIEVE EXHIBITS, ALSO FILE ORDER OF EXAMINATION.
OEX FILED; NO POS FILED, NO APPEARANCES.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BARONE, MAURIZIO
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF SEP-10-2001, OFF CALENDAR AS TO DEFENDANT BARONE, MAURIZIO
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT BARONE, MAURIZIO HEARING SET FOR OCT-25-2001 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GIMME SHOES INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARONE, MAURIZIO $4,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,620.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT BARONE, MAURIZIO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,600.00 FILED BY GIMME SHOES INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BARONE, MAURIZIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-21-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $4,600.00 FILED BY BARONE, MAURIZIO AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT GIMME SHOES INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-21-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT BARONE, MAURIZIO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT GIMME SHOES INC. PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT BARONE, MAURIZIO HEARING SET FOR SEP-10-2001 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: SEP-21-2001 AS TO DEFENDANT BARONE, MAURIZIO
OEX DISCH. IN COURT; ALL PARTIES APPEARED.
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF OCT-25-2001, DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT BARONE, MAURIZIO
